title: 6 x 10ml Floral Essential Oils Set, Premium Fragrance Oils for Diffusers, Aromatherapy, Soap & Candle Making Scents - Rose, Lavender, Jasmine, Lily of The Valley, Peony, Violet
features: 🌹Set Of 6 Floral Essential Oils: Immerse yourself in 6 enchanting floral scents. Lavender, violet and lily of the valley essential oils bring a natural healing scent, while rose, peony and jasmine essential oils create a romantic atmosphere.

🌺100% Pure & Natural : Aoruilia provides 100% pure of the highest grade quality essential oils. These aromatic essential oils are obtained by steam distillation techniques. No additives, fillers, bases or carriers added. No tested on animals. The scent is extremely rich, complex and long lasting.

🌼Multiple Benefits : Essential oils are perfect for aromatherapy to relax the boby, balance the mood, reduce stress, improve sleep, and more. Mix aroma oils with carrier oil or daily skin care products and apply to skin to moisturize and smooth skin blemishes like acne, scars.

🌸Widely Use : Simply add a few drops to your aroma diffuser, stone diffuser, reed diffues or humidifier for a fresh air. The aromatherapy oils also great for massage, spa, saunas, skin care, home cleaning and DIY homemade products like perfume, spray, body lotion, candle, soap, bath bombs, shampoo, ect.
💮Best Gift Set for Women: Elegant packaging makes for the perfect gift for Christmas, Birthdays, Thanksgiving, Anniversaries, Holidays, Teachers Day, Mother's days, Valentine’s days, and more.
description: Product description Aoruilia 6 x 10ml Essential Oils Set, Essential Oils for Diffusers for Home, Candle Making Ingredients Rose, Lavender, Jasmine, Lily Of The Valley, Peony, Violet Directions Use 3-5 drops in a diffuser for aromatherapy. For topical use, dilute 1-2 drops in a carrier oil. Keep out of reach of children and avoid contact with eyes and sensitive areas. Do not ingest. If pregnant or nursing, consult a healthcare provider before use. Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Safety Warning For outdoor use. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from children. If adverse reactions occur, stop using immediately. See more
